task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Landsat multispectral image in ESA SNAP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ESA SNAP application is open, and the Product Explorer panel shows the loaded file 'landsat_multispectral.tif'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Spatial Subset dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Specify Product Subset' or 'Spatial Subset' dialog box is visible over the SNAP interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the subset dimensions to exactly 100x100 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subset dialog, the width and height fields (or scene width/height) are explicitly set to 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the subset in BEAM-DIMAP format to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/snap_exports/ml_subset.dim' with the BEAM-DIMAP format selected, or the Product Explorer showing the newly saved 'ml_subset' product.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent exported the subset data as a CSV file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the CSV format and the path '/home/ga/snap_exports/ml_dataset.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing the successfully created 'ml_dataset.csv' file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ESA SNAP GUI to perform the operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the ESA SNAP graphical user interface (menus, dialogs) for subsetting and exporting, rather than using terminal commands like 'gpt' or 'gdal_translate'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually performed the subset operation in SNAP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Specify Product Subset' dialog must be actively used and applied to the original 'landsat_multispectral' product, not just renaming an existing file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't use a text editor or terminal to create a fake CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV export should be triggered from within SNAP (e.g., File -> Export -> CSV) rather than a terminal 'echo' command or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The spatial subset must be exactly 100 pixels wide and 100 pixels high. The subset must be saved in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_subset.dim. The final data must be exported as a CSV file to /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_dataset.csv. A correct 100x100 subset will result in exactly 10,000 rows of pixel data in the CSV.
